reminders.title: Flu shots tomorrow after work - Walgreens on Federal
reminders.description: Both of us at 4:30. Bring insurance cards. The one on Federal by King Soopers.

reminders.title: Grab insurance cards for flu shots today
reminders.description: In the file folder by the desk. Need both cards.

reminders.title: Drop car at Midas in the morning
reminders.description: Midas on S. Federal, 8 AM appointment. Oil change, tire rotation, brake inspection. Drop off the key at the front desk.

reminders.title: Start holiday gift shopping - budget $300
reminders.description: Gift ideas: book set for Pilar (check Amazon), hiking gear for Tomas (check REI). Stay under $300 total.

reminders.title: Luna vet tomorrow - carrier ready
reminders.description: Get the carrier out of the hall closet. No food for Luna after midnight.

reminders.title: No food for Luna after 10pm
reminders.description: Dental cleaning tomorrow requires fasting. Pick up food bowl before bed.

reminders.title: Check Luna's gums
reminders.description: Day 3 after dental cleaning. Redness should be going down.

reminders.title: Check Amazon tracking - Pilar's books
reminders.description: Should arrive by Dec 18. Need time to wrap before Christmas.

reminders.title: Wrap Christmas gifts
reminders.description: Both packages should be here. Wrapping paper in the hall closet. Hide Tomas's gift in the spare room.

reminders.title: Renew passport
reminders.description: Passport expires this year. Renew before June.

reminders.title: Review new lease with Tomás tonight
reminders.description: Cornerstone sent the 2-year lease renewal. Read through it together, make sure the $1,690 rate and April 1 start date are correct.

reminders.title: Check travel insurance options
reminders.description: Compare plans for Portugal trip. Got Allianz quote already.

reminders.title: Sign and return lease renewal by Friday
reminders.description: Print, sign, and scan the Cornerstone lease. Both Ana and Tomás need to sign. Email scanned PDF to leasing@cornerstoneprop.com. Due by Feb 6.

reminders.title: Pick up cake from Azucar, 3 PM
reminders.description: Tres leches cake for Tomás's birthday dinner tomorrow. Azucar Bakery, 1886 S. Broadway.

reminders.title: Tomás's birthday dinner at Linger, 7 PM
reminders.description: Reservation for 6 at Linger. Pilar, Marco, Becca, Lisa.

reminders.title: Prep seed starting supplies
reminders.description: Need seed starting mix, 72-cell trays, plant labels, spray bottle. Ask Tomas to set up the grow light in the spare room this weekend.

reminders.title: Start tomato seedlings indoors
reminders.description: Plant Early Girl, San Marzano, and Sungold Cherry in seed starting mix. Use 72-cell trays under grow light. Keep soil 70-75F.

reminders.title: Start pepper seedlings
reminders.description: Jalapeno, poblano, and red bell. Same setup as tomatoes. Peppers germinate slower, be patient.

reminders.title: Print booking confirmations
reminders.description: Print flight, hotel, and tour confirmations for travel folder.

reminders.title: Check frost date - last frost ~May 5
reminders.description: Average last frost in Denver is May 5. Check extended forecast before putting anything outside. Don't transplant until overnight lows are consistently above 40.

reminders.title: Buy travel adapter
reminders.description: Need travel adapter for Portugal outlets. Check Amazon or Target.

reminders.title: Printing deadline - finalize gift
reminders.description: Send final PDF to Mile High Bindery by March 10-12. All 37 recipes must be done.

reminders.title: Fill out annual wellness form for work
reminders.description: Dr. Reyna needs the annual health clearance form completed for all clinical staff by end of month. Ask Dr. Chen to fill out the provider section. Just the accommodation confirmation, nothing extra.

reminders.title: Pick up printed gift
reminders.description: Mile High Bindery, 2890 Walnut St. Pilar's birthday is April 12.

reminders.title: Confirm Sintra day trip reservation
reminders.description: Email the tour company back to confirm June 15 booking for 2 people. They need final headcount by end of March.
